name: Augusta Raurica Roman City
description: The best-preserved Roman city north of the Alps with a reconstructed Roman house and theatre.
longDescription: Augusta Raurica near Basel was once a thriving Roman colony of 20,000 inhabitants. Today it is the best-preserved Roman site north of the Alps with a fully reconstructed Roman house, a 10,000-seat theatre, a museum with the famous silver treasure, and free-access archaeological park.

providers.name: Augusta Raurica (Outdoor Park)
providers.description: Free access to archaeological park and theatre

providers.name: Augusta Raurica Museum
providers.description: Museum with silver treasure and Roman artefacts
